title: Career Compass — AI-Powered Career Guidance Platform
description: An intelligent career guidance platform that analyzes user skills, interests, and education to generate personalized career paths with structured roadmaps, learning resources, and actionable steps.
impact: Helps users make informed career decisions by providing personalized, AI-driven guidance instead of generic advice.

title: GymBro — AI-Powered Personalized Fitness Trainer
description: An AI-based fitness app that delivers personalized workout and diet plans with real-time form correction using computer vision and voice feedback for an interactive training experience.
impact: Makes personal fitness training accessible while reducing injury risk through real-time posture correction.

title: TeamFit AI — Real-Time Collaborative Coding Platform
description: A real-time collaborative coding platform with multi-user sessions, keystroke-level contribution tracking, and AI-powered insights to evaluate team performance and coding behavior.
impact: Improves team collaboration by providing real-time insights into productivity, contribution, and coding patterns.

title: macOS Portfolio — Interactive OS UI Experience
description: A highly interactive portfolio inspired by macOS, featuring draggable windows, dock interactions, dynamic app states, and a simulated operating system UI built with React.
impact: Demonstrates advanced frontend engineering skills including state management, UI architecture, and system-level interaction design.
